arts.ttl: Tactics and attitude behind Bayern Munich’s dominant pressing style, says Eric Dier
arts.sum: Eric Dier's thoughts on the win over Hoffenheim: "A lovely evening. Opening up about the hunger in the squad to recover the ball immediately after losing it, Dier gave credit to the team’s preparation and attitude.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl lays out clear path to an extension for Leroy Sané
arts.sum: If he performs like he did against Hoffenheim, then he’s definitely a player who is an option for Bayern Munich.” But if you ask Max Eberl, Sané’s potential was on full display against Hoffenheim.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich is NOT interested in Manchester City’s Kyle Walker
arts.sum: Back in 2023, there was a somewhat brief craze surrounding a potential acquisition of Manchester City defender Kyle Walker by Bayern Munich . That might come as a relief to some Bayern Munich fans, who were not looking forward to a potential acquisition of Walker.

arts.ttl: Leroy Sané lauds team-first attitude after leading Bayern Munich to 5-0 win over Hoffenheim
arts.sum: It was exactly what the doctor order for Vincent Kompany, especially after Bayer Leverkusen had once again reduced Bayern’s gap at the top of the Bundesliga table to just one point with their 1-0 win over Mainz just one day prior to Bayern’s demolition of Hoffenheim. After receiving a fair amount of criticism for missing the open goal attempt in the second half of the draw at Gladbach, Leroy Sané looked like his old self against Hoffenheim and was well-deserving of the pair of goals he scored.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 27: Bayern Munich and Tom Bischof — let’s discuss; Is Jonas Urbig too expensive?; Bayern chasing another center-back?; The winger surge is coming; Alphonso Davies...in or out?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Let’s talk about Bayern Munich’s rumored signing of Tom Bischof. Games are coming hot and heavy for Bayern Munich...

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. Wolfsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and Wolfsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Report: After talks, tension between Bayern Munich and agent for Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalists Florian Plettenberg and Kerry Hau, things have, indeed, taken a step back between Bayern Munich and Alphonso Davies — with the player’s camp pushing for more money: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Hardline Approach: Oliver Kahn feels Bayern Munich should set a Joshua Kimmich deadline
arts.sum: The trio of key Bayern players all have current contracts that are set to expire this summer and can all technically talk to other clubs and even sign pre-contracts now that the first of the month has passed. As Max Eberl recently put it, Bayern Munich is entering “crunch time” for the contract negotiations for Jamal Musiala, Alphonso Davies, and Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany praises “hungry” Bayern Munich after dominant display vs. Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Bayern Munich got after it in Wednesday’s 5-0 Bundesliga win over TSG Hoffenheim — an energetic display that has Bavarian spirits soaring. The win leaves Bayern solidly ahead of defending champions Bayer Leverkusen in this year’s Bundesliga title race and keeps the pressure on Xabi Alonso’s men.

arts.ttl: Sources: Everton have held talks over winger likened to Leroy Sane as Fulham and Newcastle also keen
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm Everton’s stance towards Ernest Nuamah, with the likes of Fulham and Newcastle United also keen. Nuamah has struggled for game...
